ol.li:
Election Timeout: 150-300ms random
Breaks symmetry without coordination

Candidate Transition: term++, vote for self
Persist votedFor BEFORE sending RPCs

RequestVote RPC: parallel to all peers
Include lastLogTerm, lastLogIndex

Vote Granting: check log up-to-date
Compare term first, then index

Majority Check: votes >= (N/2 + 1)
5-node cluster: need 3 votes

Leader Heartbeat: immediate on election
Establish authority, suppress elections

Split Vote Resolution: random timeouts
First to timeout in next round wins
